-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

Hi,

Please update your ports tree and try again. I've added an explicit
dependnecy on libgcrypt to libsoup and libsoup-gnome and bumped the
PORTREVISION, so portupgrade/portmaster should catch the need to rebuild
now.

Steve
